description: Longitudinal checkpoint for whether Anda Brain learns and uses a user's writing style preference.

timeline.user: Can you help me polish this technical blog post?
Please make it more concise and direct. Less hype, less academic setup.

timeline.query: Can you rewrite this to sound more like me?

evaluation.scoring_rubric: The answer should use the user's learned writing-style preference.

expected_memories.description: User prefers concise, direct writing and dislikes hype.

probe.command: SEARCH CONCEPT "concise direct writing style" MODE "semantic" THRESHOLD 0.6 LIMIT 10
